<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Logging\TeamCity\Subscriber; use PHPUnit\Event\TestRunner\ExecutionFinished; use PHPUnit\Event\TestRunner\ExecutionFinishedSubscriber; /** * @internal */ final class TestExecutionFinishedSubscriber extends Subscriber implements ExecutionFinishedSubscriber { public function notify(ExecutionFinished $event): void { $this->logger()->testExecutionFinished($event); } }
